headline: Why The Stevanato Group (STVN) Investment Story Is Being Reset On GLP 1 And Biologics
summary: Stevanato Group’s fair value estimate has been revised from US$28.78 to US$24.72, a cut of about 14% that resets expectations around the stock’s potential upside. Analysts linking this shift to lower GLP-1 guidance, softer Engineering orders, and differing views on how quickly current biologics strength turns into consistent earnings now span a wide target range of roughly US$19 to US$32. As you read on, you will see what is driving these views and how to keep track of the evolving Stevanato...
